description_long: This is a classic octagonal stop sign mounted on a tall, slender metal pole. The sign face is a vivid red with a white border and features the word 'ALTO' in bold, uppercase white letters, indicating it is intended for Spanish-speaking regions. The sign shows some weathering and minor surface wear, suggesting outdoor use. The pole is dark, likely made of galvanized steel, and extends well below the sign face for secure installation in the ground. The overall construction is robust, designed to withstand urban outdoor conditions and provide clear traffic instructions.
description: A red octagonal stop sign with 'ALTO' in white letters, mounted on a tall metal pole and showing signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: A side view showing the thin profile of the sign and pole, with no visible text or face details.
description_view_1: A rear view displaying the plain back of the octagonal sign and the supporting pole.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, showing the slim edge of the sign and pole.
description_view_3: The front view reveals the red octagonal sign with 'ALTO' in white uppercase letters, bordered in white, mounted on a dark pole.
